typical_use_cases: Greenfield or brownfield renewable, storage and grid assets with ring-fenced cash flows and bankable contracts.
key_kpis_or_covenants: Construction completion tests, DSCR, reserve accounts, EPC and O&M covenants, eligible green asset tests
advantages: Strong lender control, long tenor, suited to SPVs and syndication for large assets
risks_limitations: Execution risk during construction, documentation intensity, less efficient for small fragmented assets

typical_use_cases: Use-of-proceeds financing for eligible capex, retrofit programmes or portfolio build-out at the corporate level.
typical_borrower_or_issuer: Corporates, developers, real-estate owners, financial institutions
key_kpis_or_covenants: Eligible use-of-proceeds schedule, reporting undertakings, leverage and cash-sweep terms where relevant
advantages: Faster than bond issuance, flexible drawdown, works for repeat capex programmes
risks_limitations: Needs clear asset eligibility and reporting discipline; tenor is shorter than project finance

typical_use_cases: Portfolio refinancing, operating asset take-outs and repeat funding for issuers with credible reporting and market access.
typical_borrower_or_issuer: Investment-grade corporates, utilities, infrastructure funds, financial institutions
key_kpis_or_covenants: Use-of-proceeds ring-fencing, allocation reporting, impact reporting, negative pledge or standard bond covenants
advantages: Scalable refinancing tool, opens institutional capital pools, lowers dependence on bank balance sheets
risks_limitations: Requires market access, disclosure readiness and sufficient issuance size; less efficient during construction

typical_use_cases: General corporate purpose or capex financing where pricing is linked to borrower-level sustainability KPIs.
typical_borrower_or_issuer: Corporates, EPCs, mobility operators, financial institutions
key_kpis_or_covenants: SPTs tied to emissions, renewable share, energy intensity, recycling, safety or supply-chain metrics; margin ratchet
advantages: Works even when funds are not ring-fenced, good transition tool for diversified borrowers, can scale across relationship banks
risks_limitations: KPI calibration can be weak if targets are not ambitious; reputational risk if SPTs are not credible

typical_use_cases: Capital markets financing for larger issuers that can commit to public transition KPIs and step-up structures.
typical_borrower_or_issuer: Large corporates and utilities with public debt access
key_kpis_or_covenants: Public SPTs, coupon step-up or alternative economics, annual assurance and external review
advantages: Balance-sheet flexibility with public-market sizing and visible transition signaling
risks_limitations: Public scrutiny is high, weak targets are penalized, and sub-investment-grade execution can be volatile

typical_use_cases: Financing for decarbonisation pathways in hard-to-abate sectors where assets or plans may not be fully green today.
typical_borrower_or_issuer: Steel, cement, chemicals, transport, diversified industrial corporates
key_kpis_or_covenants: Transition plan milestones, capex deployment tests, emissions-intensity pathways, leverage and liquidity covenants
advantages: Useful where activities are transition-enabling but not fully taxonomy-green; preserves bank dialogue on strategy
risks_limitations: Framework scrutiny is high; eligibility boundaries can be contentious and transaction preparation can be heavy

typical_use_cases: Capital markets instrument for transition capex or refinancing under a documented transition framework.
typical_borrower_or_issuer: Large corporates and utilities in hard-to-abate sectors
key_kpis_or_covenants: Transition framework, eligible project list or transition-plan disclosures, reporting and assurance
advantages: Diversifies funding for large transition issuers and can refinance multiple projects at once
risks_limitations: Investor acceptance depends on framework credibility and issuer disclosure quality

product_name: ESG-linked working capital / sustainable trade finance
typical_use_cases: Supply-chain finance, letters of credit, receivables and working-capital lines tied to sustainability performance or eligible trade flows.
typical_borrower_or_issuer: EPCs, manufacturers, exporters, mobility operators, financial institutions
key_kpis_or_covenants: Working-capital borrowing base, sustainability margin ratchet, supplier onboarding criteria, eligible trade-flow tests
advantages: Fits procurement and execution cycles, can reach supply chains, useful bridge before term debt or bonds
risks_limitations: Short tenor and operational complexity; not a substitute for long-dated capex finance

typical_use_cases: Higher-risk, first-loss or concessional structures for new technologies, underserved segments or early-market platforms.
typical_borrower_or_issuer: Developers, financial institutions, platform aggregators, public-private partnerships
key_kpis_or_covenants: Concessional tranche terms, eligibility criteria, policy-linked milestones, reporting to catalytic capital providers
advantages: Crowds in commercial lenders, absorbs early-stage risk, useful for storage, distributed assets and nascent technologies
risks_limitations: Structuring is slower, concessional capital is scarce, and governance can be complex

typical_use_cases: Revenue support or incentive structures linked to verified emissions reductions, carbon credits or outcomes-based programmes.
typical_borrower_or_issuer: Project developers, industrial corporates, building portfolios, platform operators
key_kpis_or_covenants: Monitoring, reporting and verification, credit issuance rules, delivery obligations, buffer or reserve mechanics
advantages: Can improve project economics for efficiency, nature and early-transition projects that need incremental revenue
risks_limitations: Price volatility, policy uncertainty and verification complexity limit bankability as a stand-alone funding source

typical_use_cases: Refinancing diversified pools of operating assets such as rooftop solar, EV receivables or efficiency portfolios.
typical_borrower_or_issuer: Financial institutions, NBFCs, aggregators, infrastructure funds
key_kpis_or_covenants: Pool eligibility criteria, delinquency triggers, over-collateralisation, servicing and reporting covenants
advantages: Recycles balance-sheet capacity and matches fragmented operating assets to institutional demand
risks_limitations: Requires asset history, data quality and standardisation; execution is inefficient before portfolios season
